thesis_at_open: CLOSED. ARCC $17P 2026-04-17 expired worthless. Original thesis: macro tail-risk hedge / credit-spread widening expectation that did not materialize within the contract window. Premium lost ~$15. Lesson: bought protection without a defined exit/roll trigger; theta beat realized vol.
what_happened: Long put protection bought as macro tail-risk hedge. Underlying did not breach strike before expiry. Position decayed to zero via theta.
lesson: Bought protection without a defined exit/roll trigger or vol-based sizing. Theta beat realized vol. Going forward: tail hedges need (a) explicit roll-or-kill date ≥ 21 DTE, (b) vol regime check before entry, (c) sizing as % of expected drawdown, not flat $.
author: DFV-sprint0-backfill
